query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tournament_participants (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  tournamentId INT NOT NULL,
  playerId INT NOT NULL,
  seed INT,
  status ENUM('registered', 'checked_in', 'playing', 'eliminated', 'winner') DEFAULT 'registered' NOT NULL,
  currentRound INT DEFAULT 0,
  wins INT DEFAULT 0,
  losses INT DEFAULT 0,
  pointsScored INT DEFAULT 0,
  registeredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  checkedInAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  eliminatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  finalPlacement INT,
  prizesWon INT DEFAULT 0,
  INDEX idx_tournament (tournamentId),
  INDEX idx_player (playerId)
);

  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  tournamentId INT NOT NULL,
  playerId INT NOT NULL,
  seed INT,
  status ENUM('registered', 'checked_in', 'playing', 'eliminated', 'winner') DEFAULT 'registered' NOT NULL,
  currentRound INT DEFAULT 0,

  registeredAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  checkedInAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  eliminatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  finalPlacement INT,
  prizesWon INT DEFAULT 0,
  INDEX idx_tournament (tournamentId),
  INDEX idx_player (playerId)
);
